'''takoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalesia|scalesia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalesia|scalesia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| takoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tækeyeth|tækeyeth]] || [[word:tækeyej|tækeyej]] || [[word:tækeyesh|tækeyesh]] || [[word:tækeye|tækeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:takokoyoth|takokoyoth]] || [[word:takokoyoj|takokoyoj]] || [[word:takokoyosh|takokoyosh]] || [[word:takokoyo|takokoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:takoyoth|takoyoth]] || [[word:takoyoj|takoyoj]] || [[word:takoyosh|takoyosh]] || [[word:takoyo|takoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:takofyoth|takofyoth]] || [[word:takofyoj|takofyoj]] || [[word:takofyosh|takofyosh]] || [[word:takofyof|takofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:takoyotho|takoyotho]] || [[word:takoyojo|takoyojo]] || [[word:takoyosho|takoyosho]] || [[word:takoyoko|takoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:takoyoth|takoyoth]] || [[word:takoyoj|takoyoj]] || [[word:takoyosh|takoyosh]] || [[word:takoyo|takoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:takoyothol|takoyothol]] || [[word:takoyojol|takoyojol]] || [[word:takoyoshol|takoyoshol]] || [[word:takoyokol|takoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:takoyothotho|takoyothotho]] || [[word:takoyojojo|takoyojojo]] || [[word:takoyoshosho|takoyoshosho]] || [[word:takoyoko|takoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:takoyothon|takoyothon]] || [[word:takoyojon|takoyojon]] || [[word:takoyoshon|takoyoshon]] || [[word:takoyokon|takoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:takoyothoro|takoyothoro]] || [[word:takoyojoro|takoyojoro]] || [[word:takoyoshoro|takoyoshoro]] || [[word:takoyokoro|takoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
